mano_cua.result_summary: Turnstile 组件在页面导航切换时行为正常。初始加载后控制台有 3 个警告（postMessage 跨域 + preload 未使用），导航离开再返回后控制台警告增至 6 个但随后稳定不再增长，未出现无限循环回调。Turnstile widget 在返回页面后正常重新加载渲染。页面无卡顿无响应问题。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: After navigation away and back, console error count stabilized at 6 (3 postMessage cross-origin + preload warnings). Count did NOT keep growing — no infinite loop detected. Turnstile widgets correctly reloaded after navigation back to the page. Page remained responsive throughout.
